Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Michael Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Michelle Holmes, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of James Sanders, Deceased, and Jacquelyn Sanders, as Wrongful Death Heir of James Sanders, Deceased.
No appearance by defaulted defendant American Material Suppliers Co.
Default was entered against defendant American Material Suppliers Co. on October 15, 2015.

Economic Damages - $419,699.35.
Non-Economic Damages - $2,000,000.00.
Total - $2,419,699.35.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
